violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to send photos of clean and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH. Before resuming use of ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment must install and air gap for the ice machine, or install an evaporator pan. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The outside of the hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards, ceiling, and display shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
The hand-washing sink in the krispy chicken kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The walk-in cooler was observed held at ambient temperature of 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within the unit were evaluated and voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store TCS foods within the unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below is maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
Several rodent carcasses were observed in the back storage area of the store. Establishment is to remove carcasses and sanitize the area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards, ceiling, and display shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The dumpster enclosure was observed with excess rubbish and other debris. Establishment is to remove excess debris and rubbish to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
